We design and build production cells. We design and build production cells.
What makes us different
From 1987 until today the first BB1 transfer machine is still working and producing pieces. Since then technological development has made giant steps. Continuous research and improvement of technology has led the transfer to evolve into a machine that combines all the best machine tool technologies on the market.
